tweet.text: I wonder if the people that can’t drive. Know they can’t drive??? 🤔🤔…. Asking for a friend… #worldwide

Love Yourz Words can’t explain the true love for Ya Moms… Ya biggest fan Ya best friend Ya MVP ya Motivator Ya Ace in the Hole Ya queen of Spades Ya biggest supporter. The one who will always find a way when you don’t see one. MOM DEUCE without you there is no UsHappy Birthday https://t.co/TrlonjCgMy
